memoryArtifacts.headline: Essex England 1550 era
memoryArtifacts.description:
number in red on the map
1. "The Ray" Farmlands of Raynalde Marvin Sr on this (then) peninsula in 1554
2. Location of his house in Wrabness, bequeath to his eldest son Edward, father of Matthew and Reinhold Marvin. 
3. "Ramsey Street"
4. Ramsey Bridge shown by the lines crossing the river. 
5. Estate and home of Reinhold Marvin, the younger, was in this vicinity. 
6. Parish were Matthew and Reinold Marvin were Christen and the father died. 
7. Parish were their elder brother, Edward died.

memoryArtifacts.headline: Essex England 1900 era
memoryArtifacts.description:
The heavy line from Harwich ends at the southwest "corner" Which was the home of Edward Marvin.
"Spinels" adjoined it on the west. Spinels, Ramsey and Great Bentley are underlined.  "Sturwood" and East Hall" are near the Harwich Branch RR on the south bank of the Stour.

zh.Saint Michael Churchyard, Ramsey, Essex,: 英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊
zh.Great Bentley, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 本特利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Marvin於大約1550年出生在英國艾可拉姆齊時，他的父親Rynalde Mervyn38歲，母親Johanna32歲。他於大約1580年與Margaret在英國結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1615年11月14日在英國艾可格亞特 本特利享年66歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可拉姆齊。

zh-hans.Great Bentley, Essex, England: 英国艾可格亞特 本特利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Marvin于大约1550年出生在英国艾可拉姆齊时，他的父亲Rynalde Mervyn38岁，母亲Johanna32岁。他于大约1580年与Margaret在英国结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1615年11月14日在英国艾可格亞特 本特利享年66岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可拉姆齊。

nameMeanings.name: Marvin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Leicestershire and Lincolnshire): from the Middle English personal name Merefin, Merevin, Old English Merefin. This is probably formed with Old English mere ‘sea’ + Finn (a personal name derived from the ethnic name). Alternatively, it may be a borrowing of an unrecorded Old Norse name Møra-Finnr.
Slovenian: nickname from marvin, the name of a tart light red wine.

variants.name: Murfin
meanings: English (Derbyshire): probably from the Middle English personal name Mer(e)fin; see Marvin .

History: The first Murfins in North America were Nottinghamshire Quakers. Robert and Ann Murfin and their daughter Mary sailed from Hull, England, in 1678 on the ship Shield of Stockton and settled at Chesterfield, near Burlington, NJ.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Marvin was born about 1550, in Ramsey, Essex, England, his father, Rynalde Mervyn, was 38 and his mother, Johanna, was 32. He married Margaret about 1580, in England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 14 November 1615, in Great Bentley, Essex, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Marvin est né environ 1550, à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Rynalde Mervyn, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Johanna, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret environ 1580, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 14 novembre 1615, à Great Bentley, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Ramsey, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Marvin um 1550 in Ramsey, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rynalde Mervyn 38 und seine Mutter Johanna 32. Er hat um 1580 in England Margaret geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 14. November 1615 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Great Bentley, Essex, England und wurde in Ramsey, Essex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Marvin è nato il circa 1550 nel Ramsey, Essex, England, il suo padre, Rynalde Mervyn, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Johanna, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret circa 1580, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 14 novembre 1615, nel Great Bentley, Essex, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Ramsey, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Saint Michael Churchyard, Ramsey, Essex,: イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイ
ja.Ramsey, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスラムセイ
ja.Great Bentley, Essex, England: イギリスエセックスグレアト ベントリー
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Marvinが約1550年にイギリスエセックスラムセイで生まれた時，父Rynalde Mervynは38歳，母Johannaは32歳であった。約1580年にイギリスでMargaretと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1615年11月14日にイギリスエセックスグレアト ベントリーで66歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスラムセイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Marvin(이)가 대략 1550년 영국 에세스 램지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rynalde Mervyn(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1580년 영국에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1615년 11월 14일 영국 에세스 그리트 벤틀리에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 램지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Marvin nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Rynalde Mervyn, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Johanna, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret aproximadamente 1580, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 14 de novembro de 1615, em Great Bentley, Essex, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Marvin родился около 1550 г. в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Rynalde Mervyn было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret около 1580 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер около 14 ноября 1615 г. в местности грит бентли, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности рамси, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Marvin nació aproximadamente 1550, en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Rynalde Mervyn, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Johanna, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret aproximadamente 1580, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 14 de noviembre de 1615, en Great Bentley, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Ramsey, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
